wk Wikiwiki Wikiwiki

Records

Concepts6 Decisions5 Devlog8 Notes3 Symbols5 Links2

Generated Wikiwiki site

Decisions

Product, architecture, workflow, and implementation decisions with rationale.

Decision

5 records

Decision high

Compile UX and DX human wikis through agent-mediated drafts

Generate both UX and DX compile drafts by default, let the active IDE agent author the prose, then validate and publish the result with wk compile apply.

compileuxdxagent-workflowagentic-ide decision_5ad8c2cf-266c-4824-8833-1d40103933b9
Decision high

Generate a static HTML site for human wiki browsing

Add wk site as a separate static site generator that reads structured records, preserves wk render Markdown output, and writes a browsable wiki-site/ folder with .html links, navigation, subtle metadata, responsive CSS, and local search data.

siteuxdxhuman-wikistatic decision_92c5a4f4-121d-4146-bb7d-9e0c3f780574
Decision high

Prepare scoped npm package without publishing

Use @thjodann/wk as the scoped npm package name, expose wk as the primary binary, keep wikiwiki as a compatibility alias, and verify package contents with npm pack --dry-run.

packageciv1rename decision_e5333a83-7321-4a65-b040-12c1487f60e7
Decision high

Use JSONL for MVP storage

Store each record type in an append-only JSONL file under .wikiwiki/records.

storagemvp decision_3b942fb5-f31d-4ffb-ae25-4c3d2dfab1bd
Decision high

Use wk as primary CLI identity

Keep Wikiwiki as the brand, rename the scoped package to @thjodann/wk, make wk the primary CLI binary and Commander display name, and preserve wikiwiki as a compatibility alias.

clirenameagent-workflow decision_e28e5351-dd00-4ba1-841d-278b639ae1c8
